# CreditIQ - India's Credit Card Intelligence Platform

> Unbiased, affiliate-bias-free credit card recommendations for 93+ cards across 17 Indian banks.

## What CreditIQ does

CreditIQ helps Indian consumers find the best credit card for their spending profile. Unlike comparison sites that rank by affiliate commission, CreditIQ uses AI-powered analysis to surface the genuinely best card for each user.

## Key pages

- [All Credit Cards](https://www.creditiq.app/cards)
- [Best Travel Cards](https://www.creditiq.app/best-cards/travel)
- [Best Cashback Cards](https://www.creditiq.app/best-cards/cashback)
- [Best Fuel Cards](https://www.creditiq.app/best-cards/fuel)
- [Best Dining Cards](https://www.creditiq.app/best-cards/dining)
- [Best Shopping Cards](https://www.creditiq.app/best-cards/shopping)
- [Best Lounge Cards](https://www.creditiq.app/best-cards/lounge)
- [Spend Optimizer](https://www.creditiq.app/spend-optimizer)
- [Card Comparison](https://www.creditiq.app/compare)
